title: Resolution Approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2021 in the Total Amount of Four Million Pesos and 00/100 (P 4,000,000.00) to Be Taken From the Actual Income From Real Property Tax (RPT) of the Previous Year in Excess of the Estimated Income for the Year 2021 in the Amount of Two Million Four Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 2,400,000.00), Government Equity in the Amount of Six Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 600,000.00) and Other
